name: Tangy Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 can Frozen Pineapple-Orange Juice Concentrate, thawed
3 lb Chicken, skinned, cut into pieces, and frozen
recipeInstructions:
FOR SAUCE: In a small bowl, combine the juice concentrate, catsup, and lemon juice. Pour about half of the sauce into a crockpot. Add tapioca to the cooker; stir.
FOR SPICE BAG: Place cinnamon, allspice, and cloves in cheesecloth and tie. Add bag to cooker. Place frozen chicken pieces into the crockpot. Pour remaining sauce over chicken.
Cover; cook on low-heat setting for 10-12 hours or high-heat setting for 4 1/2-5 1/2 hours. Discard spice bag. Transfer chicken to a serving platter. Skim fat from sauce. Serve sauce and hot couscous with chicken.
